---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research — Germán Pupato"
---

## Publications

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Estimating the Gains from Trade in Frictional Local Labor Markets**]{.pub-title}\
with Jeanne Tschopp and Benjamin Sand\
[*Scandinavian Journal of Economics*, Vol. 128, Issue 1, 2026, pp. 152–200.]{.pub-venue}\
[[paper](files/pupato-tschopp-sand-SJE2026.pdf)]&nbsp;·&nbsp;[[online appendix](files/pupato-tschopp-sand-SJE2026-appendix.pdf)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Performance Pay, Trade and Inequality**]{.pub-title}\
[*Journal of Economic Theory*, Vol. 172, November 2017, pp. 478–504.]{.pub-venue}\
[[paper](files/pupato-JET2017.pdf)]&nbsp;·&nbsp;[[online appendix](files/pupato-JET2017-appendix.pdf)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Unobservable Skill Dispersion and Comparative Advantage**]{.pub-title}\
with Matilde Bombardini and Giovanni Gallipoli\
[*Journal of International Economics*, Vol. 92, Issue 2, 2014, pp. 317–329.]{.pub-venue}\
[[paper](files/bombardini-gallipoli-pupato-JIE2014.pdf)]&nbsp;·&nbsp;[[online appendix](files/bombardini-gallipoli-pupato-JIE2014-appendix.pdf)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Skill Dispersion and Trade Flows**]{.pub-title}\
with Matilde Bombardini and Giovanni Gallipoli\
[*American Economic Review*, Vol. 102, Issue 5, 2012, pp. 2327–2348.]{.pub-venue}\
[[paper](files/bombardini-gallipoli-pupato-AER2012.pdf)]&nbsp;·&nbsp;[[online appendix](files/bombardini-gallipoli-pupato-AER2012-appendix.pdf)]&nbsp;·&nbsp;[[data and code](https://www.openicpsr.org/openicpsr/project/112549/version/V1/view)]
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Innovation and Productivity in Developing Countries**]{.pub-title}\
with Daniel Chudnovsky and Andrés López\
[*Research Policy*, Vol. 35, Issue 2, 2006, pp. 266–288.]{.pub-venue}
:::

## Working Papers

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Spatial Trade with Transportation Markets**]{.pub-title}\
with Busra Ariduru
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Identifying Sources of Comparative Advantage**]{.pub-title}\
with Myung Seong Kim
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**How Robust is the Skill-Dispersion–Complementarity Hypothesis?**]{.pub-title}\
with Matilde Bombardini and Giovanni Gallipoli
:::

## Work in Progress

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Informality and Labor Market Outcomes**]{.pub-title}\
with Carlos Henrique Corseuil
:::

::: {.pub-entry}
[**Non-Market Interactions and Entry into Export Markets: An Empirical Analysis**]{.pub-title}
:::
